$comment: Removed additionalProperties: false. Make sure to use unevaluatedProperties: false in parent schemas.
title: Clinical Concept Code
description:
A clinical concept code with its identifier, preferred name, and optional vocabulary and vocabulary version.

**Use**: Used in semantic data interoperability, search, and filtering.

**Guidelines**: Ensure the concept code is semantically correct and comes from one of the standardised vocabularies. Set to the field to `null` if there is no matching standardised clinical concept or a matching concept wasn't looked up.
- `code` must be a valid identifier from the specified vocabulary.
- `name` must match the preferred name of the concept in the specified vocabulary.
- `code` and `name` must be matching pairs within the specified vocabulary.
- `vocabulary` should be a stable, recognisable identifier (e.g., SNOMED-CT, ICD-10).
- `vocabularyVersion`should be stated when possible.

**Constraints**:
- `code` A string or ineger.
- `code` *Maximum length*: 255 characters if a string.
- `name` *Maximum length*: 255 characters.
- `vocabulary` *Maximum length*: 75 characters.
- `vocabularyVersion` *Maximum length* 75 characters.

code.title: Code
code.description: A clinical concept code from one of the standardised clinical vocabularies.

name.title: Name
name.description: The preferred clinical concept name associated with the code.

vocabulary.title: Vocabulary
vocabulary.description: The standardised clinical vocabulary associated with the code.
